まったく、アーデルハイト様から呼び出されたから来たのに、<br>人を呼んでおいて:
Honestly, I came because Lady Adelheid summoned me, but to summon
someone and then be absent—what is the meaning of this?
しかし、この建物のセンスはなんですの？<br>芸術性も、気品も、ひとかけらも感じ:
However, what is with the taste of this building? I cannot detect even
a fragment of artistry or refinement.
お兄様もそう思うでしょう？<br>……いいえ、お兄様に聞いただけ無駄でしたわね。:
You think so too, don't you, Elder Brother? ... No, it was futile to ask
you.
しかし、アーデルハイト様は、いつ帰って来るのかしら？<br>まったく時間が勿体な: But when will Lady Adelheid return? Honestly, what a waste of time...
そうだ！ ねぇ……お兄様。わたくしが退屈しないよう、<br>何か気の利いた話の一:
That's it! I say... Elder Brother. Could you tell me something witty to
keep me from getting bored? Perhaps about your past?
